summary: Tested MC Audit Window Calculator and Library Email Capture features. Found and fixed 2 bugs: (1) floating point crash in MCAuditWindow grid rendering, (2) wrong API URL in email capture. After fixes, all 13 test scenarios passed.

bugs_found_and_fixed.issue: Floating point bug: cellDay = (i+1)*(548/18) produced 182.67 and 365.33 which fall between phase ranges (gaps at 182-183 and 365-366), causing getPhaseIndex() to return -1 → PHASES[-1].color throws TypeError, crashing the entire component on date entry
bugs_found_and_fixed.fix: Added Math.floor() to cellDay calculation: Math.floor((i+1)*(548/18))

bugs_found_and_fixed.issue: Wrong API URL: /api/public/library/email-capture returned 404. Correct path is /api/library/email-capture

context_for_next_testing_agent: MC Audit Window Calculator working on both /reach-diagnostic and /compliance-library. All 4 phases (INSTALLATION/CRITICAL WINDOW/PRE-AUDIT/AUDIT ELIGIBLE) render correctly. Email capture on /compliance-library submits to /api/library/email-capture and shows CONFIRMED state. Two bugs were fixed in this iteration.
